about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Press '...'
3. Observe '...'

**Expected behavior**
A clear description of what you expected to happen.

**Environment (please complete):**

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Minecraft version | 1.20.1 / 1.21.1 / 1.21.11 / 26.1.2 / 26.2 |
| Loader | Forge / NeoForge / Fabric |
| Loader version | e.g. Forge 47.4.4 |
| ControlFlex version | e.g. 1.0.0 |
| Controller model | e.g. Xbox Series X |
| Connection type | USB / Bluetooth / Wireless adapter |
| OS | Windows 11 / macOS 14 / Linux |
| Other mods | List any potentially relevant mods |

**Screenshots / Logs**
If applicable, attach screenshots or the latest log file (`logs/latest.log`).

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
